avatar.container: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(224,122,77,0.2); border: 2px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.4);
avatar.image: object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s ease; filter: sepia(0.15);

header.userName: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #7B5B3A; letter-spacing: 0.03em; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #A0785A; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.4); background: rgba(245,230,211,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

h2.base: margin: 0; font-size: 1.5em; letter-spacing: 0.02em; line-height: 1.5; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

styles.paragraph: line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.1em; font-size: 15px; color: #5A4A3A; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #A0785A; background: rgba(160,120,90,0.1); padding: 0 4px; border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(160,120,90,0.4);

list.item: margin-bottom: 0.7em; font-size: 15px; color: #6B5B4A; line-height: 1.8; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #6B5B4A; line-height: 1.8; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

code.block: background: #E8DCC8; padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #7B5B3A; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.3);
code.inline: background: #E8DCC8; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 3px; color: #7B5B3A; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;

styles.quote: border-left: 3px solid #B8860B; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #7B5B3A; font-style: italic; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(184,134,11,0.05); font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(123,91,58,0.15); filter: sepia(0.1);
styles.link: color: #C55A5A; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(197,90,90,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.3);
table.header: background: #E8DCC8; font-weight: 600; color: #7B5B3A; padding: 12px; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
table.cell: padding: 12px; color: #6B5B4A; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.2); font-family: 'Georgia', serif;

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 2px dashed rgba(224,122,77,0.3); margin: 28px 0;

footnote.ref: color: #A0785A; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
footnote.backref: color: #A0785A; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-family: 'Georgia', serif;
